bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: chief-strategist (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 8 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 化工

Owner: energy-analyst · Thesis v2 · Ticks: 1 · Materials: 6 · Deadline: 14d left · project_id: rp_33b783444cfe43a2

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 化工 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.795, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 14 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 化工's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 化工

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 化工 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.795, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 14 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 化工's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

当前化工板块维持低配评级evidence ref，主因在于高传导弹性下evidence ref能源价格若站稳$80将引爆输入性成本压力evidence ref，使投入成本成为能源传导中最脆弱的环节evidence ref。尽管硫酸高利润垫暂时支撑了铜冶炼等中游环节evidence ref，但酸价均值回归后该支撑终将瓦解。

2. 关键证据

  • 能源向基础工材传导弹性高达0.65-0.85，放大输入成本敏感性evidence ref。
  • 国际油价若企稳于$80之上将引爆跨资产巨额回撤，抬升化工用能成本evidence ref。
  • 硫酸高利润垫是阻碍冶炼减产的主因，并非环保等“必须运行”硬约束evidence ref。
  • 投入成本端是能源传导链条上的核心脆弱点，易受上游涨价挤压利润evidence ref。
  • 在资产配置层面，目前对化工板块整体仍建议维持低配评级evidence ref

KB 刷新追踪: 调味品

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 调味品 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.82, 1 live facts, 8d stale, 33 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 调味品's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

在2026-07-15宏观数据发布前，调味品及食品加工板块操作逻辑已由盲目防御转向基于规则的动态调仓，建议维持4%-6%的质量底仓 evidence ref，该仓位控制紧密挂钩于A股风格切换闸门量化标准 [th_p_1b724a84]。虽然板块历史估值具备性价比且能起防守安全垫作用 evidence ref，但在渠道价格战及强监管去概念化背景下，功能性健康声称已非强护城河 evidence ref。调味品行业真正的核心竞争优势已向B端供货稳定性、绝对成本优势以及大客户供应链履约能力收敛 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 宏观维持4%-6%底仓，依据社零餐饮增速执行双向调仓 evidence ref。
  • “零添加”宣称受制于强监管已降为入场券，无法隔绝价格战波及 evidence ref。
  • 调味品龙头以B端绝对成本领先构建护城河而非功能性概念 evidence ref。
  • 供货稳定性在连锁餐饮B端选型中超过价格成为第一门槛 evidence ref。
  • 降低防御簇敞口至40单位，以应对carr

1. 当前判断

当前工业机械板块应在海外宏观敏感与设备更新政策托底的双重背景下，从泛化Beta配置升级为带两融、解禁与因子硬闸门的精选清单 evidence refevidence ref。配置应超配政策资金可落地节点、审慎持有出口韧性节点 evidence ref。大盘工程机械（三一、徐工、杭叉、杰瑞）因子干净可进核心仓，而埃斯顿等高beta弱质量个股需按硬闸门保留观察 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 国内设备更新托底精选节点，尚难接棒出口形成广谱周期 evidence ref
  • 三一徐工等大盘机械因子干净可配，埃斯顿融资抬升需观察 evidence ref
  • 超配政策资金落地节点，审慎持有出口，回避国内广谱Beta evidence ref
  • 叉车双寡头估值低且盈利已排雷，构筑杠铃配置核心仓位 evidence ref
  • 低轨器件商应收现金周期达500-950天，面临账龄减值风险 evidence ref

Map ship-leasing stress to parent-bank capital sensitivity

Owner: financials-analyst · Thesis v4 · Ticks: 3 · Materials: 44 · Deadline: 12d left · project_id: rp_a30786de867f4e59

Kickoff: Track which parent banks are first exposed when shipping-leasing spreads, LTV deterioration, provisions, RWA inflation, and single-entity capital deduction rules hit leasing subsidiaries. This matters because the analyst's systemic-risk call depends on named parent-bank capital and provision breaches, not sector-level stress rhetoric.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when an entity-level lessor-to-parent-bank map identifies named parent banks that breach defined LTV, provision, RWA, or CAR sensitivity thresholds under the shipping-leasing stress case, or shows that no named parent breaches those thresholds.

Working hypothesis: Shipping-leasing stress will be material for specific parent banks through provisions, RWA inflation, and standalone capital deduction effects, but will not justify a systemic banking-risk call without named parent-bank breaches.

1. 当前判断

绿色动力系统交期延误与船厂拥挤共振导致船舶租赁交期拉长约105天evidence ref/research note]，这在特定母行（如交通银行）层面通过拨备计提与RWA膨胀传导压力，重度情景下将拉低并表核心一级资本充足率18.96bpevidence ref/research note]。在行业整体净息差压制至1.4

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Owner: policy-analyst · Thesis v6 · Ticks: 3 · Materials: 37 · Deadline: 11d left · project_id: rp_45294abaa5c94041

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

1. 当前判断

当前证据仍支持工作假设：generic API exemption/bridge plan是2027-04-02 Commerce review前的关税缓冲，而非覆盖1260H、BIOSECURE和实体名单的结构性保护evidence refevidence ref。Tick 3新增材料把BIOSECU

1. 当前判断

在白酒批价中枢承压与高拥挤度的背景下，虽然组合维持25%的必选消费配置目标，但由于内部面临结构性拥挤瓶颈，已将食品加工仓位限制在4%-6%的精选质量底仓而避免防御性超配evidence refevidence ref。在2026-07-15宏观数据公布前，投资重点应利用社零、餐饮和食品CPI设定双向触发器，并通过上游PPI受益篮子对冲剪刀差evidence ref。同时，消费真实增量正向即时零售与餐饮供应链等K型分化渠道迁移，组合需在此处防御性精选，并将贝塔转向政策出资耐用品以应对增长背离[thesis:th_T13]evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 山西汾酒2026年Q1营收同比下降9.68%，净利润同比下降19.03% [th_T13]
  • 618期间全网GMV微增4.0%而即时零售+112.3%，真实增量在即时零售与B端链主 [th_T13]
  • 食品加工在7月15日宏观数据前仅适合4%-6%质量底仓，并以社零等指标双向调仓 evidence ref
  • 食品加工应做精选底仓而非防御性超配，将Beta转向耐用品并用PPI受益篮子对冲成本 evidence ref
  • 必选消费维持25%的目标比例，但内部因传统板块估值与批价承压存在结构性拥挤瓶颈 [w

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Owner: global-macro · Thesis v7 · Ticks: 4 · Materials: 166 · Deadline: 8d left · project_id: rp_552290bbd6944f37

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

1. 当前判断

当前3M NCD利差仍未回落至+35bp且赎回率挂在5.8%警戒线上，th_T06的证伪出清触发条件均未达成。因PBOC结构性配给宽松、地方债重供给与保汇率约束，10Y国债收益率被钉在1.65%–1.90%窄区间内，红利核心的边际支撑基本耗尽evidence ref。政策倾向使用数量工具将10Y债率维持在1.80%以下以构筑境内信用防火墙evidence ref，离岸收紧更易触发局部高拥挤板块去杠杆，使红利低波被迫转为carry防御主导evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 3M NCD利差未降至35bp且赎回率挂于5.8%，出清信号未触发evidence ref
  • 10Y国债因供给与汇率钉在1.65%-1.90%，红利贴现率支撑耗尽evidence ref
  • 央行拟用数量工具控10Y国债率于1.80%下，防范融资挤兑构筑防火墙evidence ref
  • 离岸流动性收紧易触发高拥挤板块去杠杆，红利低波应坚守底层防御evidence ref

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 注射器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

截至2026年7月14日重新验证，2026年1月1日美国Section 301关税集中跳涨至100%击穿了中国低值耗材出口的放弃临界点，倒逼威高、英科等注射器龙头产能加速向东南亚转移 evidence ref。在大健康配置风格收缩的主线中 evidence ref，医疗设备更新虽提供真实需求支撑，但周度订单量化仪表盘 of th_p_0eb2148c 的配置应聚焦于能将政策订单转化为现金流并实现海外/高端突破的少数低覆盖标的以规避配套资金到位延迟的掣肘 [thesis:th_p_0eb2148c]evidence ref。此外，随着国务院818号令与分段生产政策落地标志行业监管触底，精选5个具备强特异性超额收益的高现金流/扭亏创新药械标的，可作为防范科技动量反转的防御性成长配置 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 301关税使美区注射器税率2026年跳涨至100% evidence ref
  • 关税倒逼威高与英科等注射器龙头加速向东南亚转移产能 evidence ref
  • 医疗设备更新需聚焦可向现金流转化的海外/高端突破标的 evidence ref
  • 818号令与分段生产政策落

2026-07-10 · Gold EM-correlation regime flip persistence

Owner: chief-strategist · Final thesis v22 · Ticks: 14 · project_id: rp_2515bfdf491e4856

Gold EM-correlation regime flip persistence — Final Report

Kickoff: Track whether golds recent flip to positive correlation with EM equities is a durable regime change or noise.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 30 consecutive days of positive gold-EM correlation (confirms persistence), OR correlation reverts below zero (flip was noise).
